Details

Load a JSON file, then pick a tactic and technique to explore.

This viewer is optimized for the nested structure: tactics → techniques → x_mitre_detection_strategies → x_mitre_analytics → x_mitre_log_source_references.
Paste JSON application/json
If your JSON is large, paste may be slow. For best performance, use Load JSON… or drag & drop.
